title: ferray-stats: chi2_contingency (needs incomplete gamma)
description: Follow-up from #724. The chi2 test statistic on contingency tables is straightforward; the p-value needs the regularised incomplete gamma function for the chi-squared CDF. Implement Q(a, x) via the standard series + continued-fraction split (a ≈ x boundary), then expose chi2_contingency(observed) -> (chi2, dof, p, expected).
